title: Eva pet peeves
wikitext:
[]: Eva pet peeves             Quote Post by honsou » Fri Jan 25, 2008 2:50 pm Is there anything about Eva or about what people say about Eva that really just gets on your nerves? For me its when people label characters (aka, Shinji is "emo", Asuka is a "bitch").

[]:             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Fri Jan 25, 2008 4:13 pm Asuka and A/S are my biggest pet peeves about Eva, sometimes i get so pissed I don't think I'll be able to see straight.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jan 25, 2008 5:05 pm If I were in the mood to stir things, I'd post something like: The Imp of the Perverse wrote: Kaminoyouni wrote: EoE Shinji and A/S are my biggest pet peeves about Eva

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Jan 25, 2008 5:31 pm all of the jumbled over-analysis that has cropped up over the years

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Fri Jan 25, 2008 7:32 pm When people present their opinions as fact, and refuse to accept anything else as remotely possible. (EoE concurrency is a golden example)

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Jan 25, 2008 7:35 pm Shiro wrote: When people present their opinions as fact, and refuse to accept anything else as remotely possible. (EoE concurrency is a golden example)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jan 25, 2008 7:45 pm When Sachiel died....

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri Jan 25, 2008 7:50 pm Folk who take Greenfield, Winn, et al's comments as gospel. Misinformation really sticks in my craw. I just really wanted to say craw.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jan 25, 2008 8:24 pm what V and new person ZapX said

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jan 25, 2008 8:37 pm ZapX wrote: Folk who take Greenfield, Winn, et al's comments as gospel. Misinformation really sticks in my craw.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Jan 25, 2008 10:09 pm Shiro wrote: When people present their opinions as fact, and refuse to accept anything else as remotely possible.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jan 25, 2008 11:00 pm CitizenGeek was everything that peeved me about Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jan 25, 2008 11:22 pm ^GOOD POINT^ kudos to you, sir

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Jan 25, 2008 11:41 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Shiro wrote: When people present their opinions as fact, and refuse to accept anything else as remotely possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jan 26, 2008 1:03 am V wrote: Some things are open to interpretation, other things actually have one "correct" version, by which I mean specifically,

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Jan 26, 2008 1:03 pm People who cry "PRETENTIOUS!!!!!" whenever a show/movie tries to make them think. This is a general pet peeve of mine that happens to apply to NGE. Also, people who confuse "interpretation" with "unfounded BS"

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Jan 26, 2008 1:39 pm chee wrote: People who cry "PRETENTIOUS!!!!!" whenever a show/movie tries to make them think. This is a general pet peeve of mine that happens to apply to NGE. Also, people who confuse "interpretation" with "unfounded BS"

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Jan 26, 2008 6:02 pm This shot has started to irk me little bit after 10000th I've seen EoE :P

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Jan 26, 2008 6:26 pm My only pet peeve would be any time Shinji freaks out his pupils get really small. In real life that would mean he is calm and relaxed. The opposite should be occurring.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sat Jan 26, 2008 6:33 pm BrikHaus wrote: My only pet peeve would be any time Shinji freaks out his pupils get really small. In real life that would mean he is calm and relaxed. The opposite should be occurring.
summary:
[]: Eva pet peeves             Quote Post by honsou » Fri Jan 25, 2008 2:50 pm Is there anything about Eva or about what people say about Eva that really just gets on your nerves? For me its when people label characters (aka, Shinji is "emo", Asuka is a "bitch").

[]:             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Fri Jan 25, 2008 4:13 pm Asuka and A/S are my bigge
